verdict: Well-synced and fun, but features excessive stream density and complex 8th-note patterns that exceed standard Easy difficulty expectations.

issues.problem: A 5-note consecutive eighth-note run with direction changes (D-U-L-R-U) is too fast and complex for beginner players on Easy.
An uninterrupted 17-second stream of quarter notes lacks physical breaks, making it overly exhausting for an Easy chart.
Transitioning from a tap to an eighth-note hold start (at 20.335) is mechanically complex and confusing for Easy-level players.
